personas.name: Frustrated Mobile User
personas.description: A user experiencing frequent app crashes and freezing issues, seeking a stable and compatible meditation app.
goals: Use a meditation app without interruptions
context: Trying to integrate with Google Fit
constraints: Limited technical expertise to troubleshoot issues

personas.name: Frustrated Audio Enthusiast
personas.description: A user seeking a meditative experience through an app, but is hindered by performance issues.
goals: Enjoy a seamless and meditative audio experience
pain_points: App crashes and bugs disrupt the experience
context: Using the app for relaxation and meditation
constraints: Cannot trust the app due to inconsistencies

personas.name: Frustrated Mindfulness Seeker
personas.description: A person seeking mindfulness and stress relief through meditation apps, frustrated by intermittent functionality.
goals: Find effective meditation and stress relief tools
pain_points: Intermittent functionality of key features like white noise and binaural beats
context: Heavy usage of meditation apps for stress relief

personas.name: Frustrated Meditation Enthusiast
personas.description: A meditation enthusiast who is frustrated with the app's performance issues and excessive email spam.
goals: To use a meditation app that works seamlessly and provides a range of options

personas.name: Frustrated Technical User
personas.description: A user experiencing technical difficulties with login and connectivity issues despite having a stable internet connection.
goals: To access and utilize the app's features without technical issues
pain_points: Error messages indicating offline status when connected
Difficulty logging in through linked accounts
context: Using the app with a stable internet connection
Linked to Google account or using email login
